brand.name: Canadian Car and Truck
brand.legal_name: Canadian Car and Truck Rentals, Sales & Leasing

hero.eyebrow: Langley · Fraser Valley · Since the working day started
hero.subhead: Cars, vans, SUVs, trucks, moving trucks and trailers — 19 rental classes plus an on-lot used inventory and in-house financing. One yard, three doors.

services.name: Vehicle Rentals
services.summary: Cars, SUVs, trucks and vans by the day, week or month.
services.description: Compact car for the airport run, full-size SUV for the family weekend, half-ton crew cab for the jobsite. Every class on the lot, ready to roll on a same-day reservation when availability holds.

services.name: Moving Truck Rentals
services.summary: Cube vans and box trucks sized for local and regional moves.
services.description: From the 1-2 ton cube van for a one-bedroom haul to the 5-ton box truck for a full house. Loaded ramps, real load decks, no surprises at the loading dock.

services.name: Trailer Rentals
services.summary: Flat-deck trailers paired to the truck class you need.
services.description: Single-axle and tandem flat-deck trailers for hauling equipment, lumber, ATVs or a second vehicle. Rented standalone or alongside one of our trucks for the full hauling stack.

services.name: Pre-Owned Vehicle Sales
services.summary: Inspected used cars, trucks and SUVs ready to drive off the lot.
services.description: Our showroom rotates with newer-model trucks and family vehicles plus the occasional collector listing. Every unit is inspected, road-tested and priced against the Fraser Valley market.

services.name: Vehicle Financing
services.summary: In-house financing options for pre-owned purchases.
services.description: Financing structured around the vehicle and the buyer, not a rate-card algorithm. We work with credit profiles across the spectrum and can quote terms after a short conversation — call for current rates.
highlights: Term lengths matched to vehicle age

services.name: Vehicle Leasing
services.summary: Leasing arrangements as an alternative to outright purchase.
services.description: When a long-haul rental crosses into ownership territory, a lease can be the better instrument. Terms are quoted per vehicle and use case — call for the structure that fits your operation.

about.lede: Canadian Car and Truck Rentals, Sales & Leasing has been moving Langley and the Fraser Valley for years on a single, working principle: bring the right vehicle within driving distance of every customer who needs one.
bodyParagraphs: We are not a national chain. We are a Langley fleet operator on Fraser Highway, running rentals across 19 classes from compact car to 5-ton box truck, plus an on-lot used inventory of trucks, SUVs and the occasional collector listing.

Add in-house financing and leasing structured around the customer rather than the algorithm, and you have a single yard equipped to rent you a van for the weekend, sell you the truck you've been eyeing, or write a lease for the small-fleet operator who walks in next.
What we sell, more than any single vehicle, is the certainty that the working unit you booked will be on the lot when you arrive — keys ready, fuelled, and inspected.

values.label: Working vehicles only
values.body: Every unit on the lot — rental or sale — is judged by whether it will hold up under the use case it's rented or sold for. No glossy listings hiding tired drivetrains.

values.label: One conversation, three options
values.body: Most customers don't know whether the right answer is a rental, a purchase, or a lease until they talk it through. We staff for that conversation.

values.label: Quoted, not surprise-billed
values.body: Rates and terms are quoted at the desk against the actual vehicle and the actual term. What we tell you on the phone is what you sign at the lot.

benefits.h2: Built for working customers, not weekend marketing.

items.title: 19 rental classes under one roof
items.body: Compact car to 5-ton box truck, plus flat-deck trailer. The class you actually need is on the lot — not on a partner network.

items.title: Local Langley, toll-free reach
items.body: 604-532-8828 for the lot, 1-888-227-7817 for everyone else in BC. Real desk staff, not an offshore call queue.

items.title: Fleet maintained in-house
items.body: Vehicles are serviced and inspected on a working schedule — not flipped between depots until the next safety check forces it.

items.title: Three service lines, one desk
items.body: Rent, buy or lease — the conversation, the staff, and the vehicle are the same. Pivot the deal without restarting at a new dealer.

contact.h1: Find the vehicle. Then find the desk.
contact.lede: Reservations, sales questions, financing and leasing all start with the same phone line. Or step in: we are on Fraser Highway, six minutes off the 1.
contact.address: 20026 Fraser Hwy., Langley, British Columbia V3A 4E5

reserve.lede: Tell us the class, the dates, and where you're heading. We confirm availability and lock the unit before you finish your coffee.
reserve.fine_print: Submitting a reservation request does not yet charge a card. A desk operator will confirm availability, the rate against the actual vehicle, and the deposit before booking is locked.

cta_section.h2: Pick a class. Lock the dates. Drive.
cta_section.body: Reserve online or call the desk. Either path puts a working vehicle on the lot for you — usually same-day.

footer.brandStatement: Three doors. One Langley yard. Rent, buy or lease — same desk, same fleet operator since the working day started.
footnotes: © 2026 Canadian Car and Truck Rentals, Sales & Leasing.
Rates and terms quoted per vehicle. Call the desk for current pricing.

seo.default_title: Canadian Car and Truck Rentals, Sales & Leasing — Langley, BC
seo.default_description: Rent cars, vans, SUVs, trucks and trailers in Langley, BC. Pre-owned vehicle sales plus in-house financing and leasing. 19 rental classes under one roof.

invented_specifics: Same-day reservation availability claim — real on most classes but not contractually guaranteed
Six minutes off the 1 — illustrative routing
